title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
summary_full: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.
summary_public: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.
